Choose between constant bitrate, quality-based, or manual QP mode.

settings.function.recording.qp.descripti: Target QP value for Manual QP mode (0-51, lower is better, requires hardware support).
settings.function.recording.codec.label: Codec
settings.function.recording.captureClien: Capture only the target window client area, excluding title bar and borders.
settings.function.recording.captureCurso: Whether to include the mouse cursor in recording.
Full cursor capture control is not supported on this system, so this toggle may not fully take effect.
settings.function.recording.autoRestartO: When window size changes during recording, automatically end the current segment and continue with the new size.
"Game Audio Only" is not supported on this system and will automatically fall back to System Audio.

onboarding.title: Welcome to SpinningMomo
onboarding.description: Please complete this setup on first launch. You can change these later in Settings.
onboarding.step1.title: Step 1: Language and Theme
onboarding.step1.description: Choose your preferred interface language and theme first.
onboarding.step2.title: Step 2: Choose Infinity Nikki Directory
onboarding.step2.detectSuccess: Game directory detected automatically. You can confirm or edit it.
onboarding.step2.detectFailed: Game directory was not detected. Please input or choose it manually.
onboarding.step2.detectConfigNotFound: Launcher config was not found. Please enter or choose the game directory manually.
onboarding.step2.detectGameDirNotFound: Launcher config was found, but the game directory could not be resolved. Please enter or choose it manually.
onboarding.step2.detectPending: Detection starts automatically when entering this step.
onboarding.step2.manualInputHint: Directory filled. Please confirm the path is correct.
onboarding.step2.skipLink: I don't play Infinity Nikki, skip!
onboarding.step2.gameDirRequired: Please enter InfinityNikki game directory, or click "I don't play Infinity Nikki, skip".
onboarding.step2.gameDirInvalid: Invalid directory. Please make sure it exists and contains InfinityNikki.exe.
onboarding.step3.title: Step 3: Target Window Title
onboarding.step3.description: Set the target game window title you want to control.
onboarding.step3.descriptionGeneric: Enter the window title you want to control, or choose one from the button on the right.
onboarding.step3.targetTitleRequired: Target window title cannot be empty.
onboarding.common.saveFailed: Failed to save onboarding settings. Please try again.
onboarding.completed.title: Setup Complete!
onboarding.completed.description: You can now close this page.

gallery.guide.infinityNikki.title: Welcome to the Infinity Nikki Gallery
gallery.guide.infinityNikki.description: It is recommended to enable the following features for a complete gallery experience and to save disk space.
gallery.guide.infinityNikki.metadataDesc: Automatically extract hidden shooting parameters from photos (including focal length, filters, lighting, and poses) to display richer details in the gallery. (Requires internet connection)
gallery.guide.infinityNikki.hardlinksTit: Optimize photos in the ScreenShot folder as hardlinks
gallery.guide.infinityNikki.hardlinksDes: The game saves two identical copies of each photo when taking pictures. This feature will replace the files in ScreenShot with hardlinks to Momo's Album so you keep a single physical file copy.
gallery.guide.infinityNikki.hardlinksDet:
• The current ScreenShot folder will be backed up to ScreenShot_old (you can delete it later).
• After that, photos in ScreenShot will share the same file as Momo's Album, new content will stay in sync automatically, and everyday copying or sending will still work as usual.
gallery.guide.infinityNikki.metadataTask: You can track progress from the task menu in the top-right corner.
gallery.guide.infinityNikki.recommendedT: Metadata extraction and ScreenShot hardlink initialization are now running as background tasks.
gallery.guide.infinityNikki.saveFailedTi: Failed to save gallery guide state

gallery.sidebar.folders.removeWatch.succ: Watching has stopped and index has been cleaned. You can add and scan again anytime.

settings.extensions.infinityNikki.initia: Infinity Nikki gallery watching has been initialized and new photos will be processed according to the current settings.
Enable the extension and configure a valid game directory before completing initialization.
Completing initialization will register the gallery watcher and start the initial scan or background tasks based on the current switches.
Enable the Infinity Nikki extension and configure a valid game directory first.
You can track the initialization progress from the background tasks menu in the top-right corner.
Failed to initialize Infinity Nikki gallery
settings.extensions.infinityNikki.metada: Automatically fetch and parse hidden shooting parameters so the gallery can show richer details.
settings.extensions.infinityNikki.hardli: Replace duplicate photos in the ScreenShot directory with hardlinks pointing to Momo's Album to save disk space.
